purpose: Read + write secret versions under a project-specific prefix
env_var: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS (path to service-account JSON) OR gcloud auth application-default login

minimum_scope.description: Create a service account dedicated to kit, then grant the two roles below at the SECRET-level (not project-level). Use IAM conditions to scope by resource.name prefix.
minimum_scope.key_file_handling: Store the SA JSON in the operator's vault (1Password / Infisical); never commit it. Reference via GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS pointing at a tmp file generated at runtime.
minimum_scope.key_rotation: Rotate the service-account key quarterly via gcloud iam service-accounts keys
